urdu transliteration text:
Ro rahi hain sochhkar, Ro rahi hain sochhkar Ummul Baneen ye Aaj bhiAsghar e Besheer jaisi Qabr ha Abbas ki
The Grave of Ali Asghar sa Resembles the Grave of Abbas sa
english translation text:
Ummul Baneen cries to this day, with this thought in mind
The grave of Abbas holds a likeness to the grave of Ali Asghar

urdu transliteration text: Rashk karti thi Me Aqs e Haider e Qarrar par,Paun Khat dete the Uske Baithkar Rahwar par,
english translation text:
I used to beam with pride, at him, the likeness of Haider
As he rode on his horse, his feet would touch the ground

urdu transliteration text: Haye Mere Sher ki , ye kaisi Haalat Ho Gai, Asghar e Besheer jaisi Qabr ha Abbas ki
english translation text:
Woe to the condition of my lion, how did this happen
The grave of Abbas holds a likeness to the grave of Ali Asghar

urdu transliteration text: Baap ke Badle Musalmano ne Bete se lie,Sar juda hai Tan juda Bazu juda hai Sher ke,
english translation text:
The ‘muslims’ exacted revenge on the son, for their hatred of the father
My lion lies with his head and arms severed

urdu transliteration text: Apki Tasweer Tukde Tukde, Hogai hai Ya AliAsghar e Besheer jaisi Qabr ha Abbas ki
english translation text:
Oh Ali, your likeness is now torn to pieces
The grave of Abbas holds a likeness to the grave of Ali Asghar

urdu transliteration text: Shaamiyo ne Laash Ko Paamal ye kehkar kiya,Kya Isi Abbas par binte Ali Ko Naaz Tha,
english translation text:
The people of Shaam trampled his body while crying out,
Is this the Abbas that the daughter of Ali was so proud of?

urdu transliteration text: Saaniye Zehra sama ye ,dekh kar roti huwiAsghar e Besheer jaisi Qabr ha Abbas ki
english translation text:
Zainab continued to cry at this sight
The grave of Abbas holds a likeness to the grave of Ali Asghar

urdu transliteration text: Kab Samata tha Meri Chader me Tu Aye Mere Laal,Kar dia hai zalimon ne Ye Tere Lasheka haal,
english translation text:
When was it possible for you to be draped in my shawl
Look what these oppressors have done to you, oh my son

urdu transliteration text: Hai Mere sar ki Rida bhi , Teri Turbat se Badi.Asghar e Besheer jaisi Qabr ha Abbas ki
english translation text:
My head covering alone is longer than your grave
The grave of Abbas holds a likeness to the grave of Ali Asghar
